observations: Samples 01 and 03 produced approximately one second of speech followed by silence.
Samples 02, 04 and 05 sounded speech-like but did not resemble the target Hindi sentences.
The English control sample was fully intelligible.
Samples 01 and 03 produced approximately three seconds of speech.
Some Hindi-like phonetic patterns became audible.
The complete target sentences were still not understandable.

decision: Increase the dataset size and training duration because the pilot demonstrated learning but insufficient Hindi intelligibility.
